cost_assumptions.model: governance-only research cost model with nonzero synthetic spread assumption
cost_assumptions.scope: costs are assumptions for planning only, not execution evidence

data_assumptions.coverage: daily synthetic close and volume fields are assumed complete
data_assumptions.source: synthetic fixture bars only, no real market data

exclusion_rules: exclude instruments with missing synthetic close or volume fields
exclude rows whose synthetic timestamp is outside the declared fixture window
expected_failure_modes: synthetic input coverage may be too small to support later diagnostics
apparent relationship may disappear when future leakage checks are applied
promotion_criteria: future study must satisfy declared diagnostics before any evidence status changes
future review must reject unsupported alpha or tradability claims

timestamp_assumptions.availability: features are available only after the synthetic bar timestamp closes
timestamp_assumptions.timezone: timestamps use UTC and retain explicit timezone information
